CREATE TABLE test_tuples (a Tuple(Int32, Int32), b Tuple(Int32, Int32));
SELECT toTypeName(tupleHammingDistance(a, b)) AS ResultType FROM test_tuples;
SELECT tupleHammingDistance((NULL, 1), (1, 1)) AS HammingDistance FROM test_tuples;
WITH (SELECT tuple(1, 2) AS t1, tuple(2, 3) AS t2) AS tuples SELECT tupleHammingDistance(t1, t2) AS HammingDistance;
SELECT a, b, tupleHammingDistance(a, b) FROM (SELECT tuple(1, 2) AS a, tuple(2, 3) AS b) AS sub;
SELECT a, b, tupleHammingDistance(a, b) FROM (SELECT tuple(1, 2) AS a, (SELECT tuple(2, 3)) AS b) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE tuple_data (num1 Int32, num2 Int32, tuple_data Tuple(Int32, Int32));
INSERT INTO tuple_data VALUES (1, 2, tuple(1, 2)), (1, 3, tuple(1, 3));
SELECT num1, num2, tupleHammingDistance(tuple_data, tuple(num1, num2)) FROM tuple_data;
